title: Boiled Crumbled Algerian Tomato
description: A fermented and flaky vegetarian-friendly Algerian dish featuring beef tomatoes that provides an energizing kick.

ingredients.name: basil leaves
ingredients.amount: a few torn into small pieces

instructions: Boil the beef tomatoes in a pot of salted water for about 10 minutes until soft.
Drain and let cool slightly, then carefully crush or crumble them into smaller pieces.
In a skillet, heat olive oil over medium heat. Add garlic and sauté for about 30 seconds until fragrant.
Add the crumbled tomatoes to the skillet with basil leaves. Cook for another 5-7 minutes, stirring occasionally, until all ingredients are evenly combined.
Season with salt to taste and serve as a snack or appetizer.
